Requirement: IF VehSpd > 250 kph, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_OOR_HI_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_OOR_HI - transition to safe state.
State: Torque = 0 Nm, LKA OFF, Warning ON
Rationale: The requirement contains multiple system responses (detect F_OOR_HI_VehSpd, react, set DTC_101_VSPD_OOR_HI, transition to safe state) which violates EARS syntax requiring a single system response per requirement. Each action should be split into separate requirements to maintain atomicity and testability.

Requirement: IF VehSpd < 0 kph, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_OOR_LO_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_OOR_LO - transition to safe state.
State: Torque = 0 Nm, LKA OFF, Warning ON
Rationale: The requirement specifies a transition to 'safe state' without defining the characteristics of that state. This creates ambiguity in verification, as the exact conditions or behaviors constituting the safe state are not specified, making it impossible to objectively test compliance.
